quality.rationale: 多步张量缩并推导结合Weyl张量定义验证+纯微分几何理论背景

origin.question:
Problem 9.27. Show that a space is conformally flat if the Riemann tensor can be written as
$$
\mathrm {R}_{\lambda \mu 
u \kappa} = \mathrm {K} (\mathbf {g}_{\lambda 
u} \mathbf {g}_{\mu \kappa} - \mathbf {g}_{\lambda \kappa} \mathbf {g}_{\mu 
u}) .
$$
![](images/fc1d86d54c5745eaf9dbdb82e3cf2f949dc00c121b17f48296920fd93a672fc2.jpg)
